steps.title: Turn the charges into points
steps.content: The first two hours cost 220 dollars, so the total-cost line passes through $(2,220)$. Five hours cost 400 dollars, so it also passes through $(5,400)$. Since every answer choice is linear, put those two points into Desmos and fit $y_1\sim m x_1+b$.

steps.title: Read the fitted line
steps.content: The regression gives $m=60$ and $b=100$, so the function is $$f(x)=60x+100.$$ This is faster than expanding the base-fee expression by hand.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is $f(x)=60x+100$, and it satisfies both $f(2)=220$ and $f(5)=400$. Choice C also has the right value at $x=5$? No: $80(5)=400$, but it gives $f(2)=160$, not 220. Choice A is correct.
